prompt: Compare these two prompts for code review: A) 'Review this code and find bugs' vs B) 'You are a senior security engineer. Review the following code for: 1) Security vulnerabilities (SQL injection, XSS, auth bypass), 2) Performance bottlenecks, 3) Error handling gaps. Output findings as a JSON array with severity, location, and fix suggestion fields.' Which is better and why?

assertions.name: declares_winner
assertions.description: Clearly declares which prompt is better (should be B)

assertions.name: scores_both_prompts
assertions.description: Provides numerical scores for both prompts across dimensions

assertions.name: shows_dimension_deltas
assertions.description: Shows per-dimension differences between the two prompts

assertions.name: explains_why_better
assertions.description: Explains specifically WHY the winner is better with concrete reasoning

assertions.name: identifies_techniques_in_b
assertions.description: Identifies the prompting techniques used in Prompt B (Role Assignment, Structured Output, etc.)

assertions.name: suggests_further_improvement
assertions.description: Suggests how the winning prompt could be further improved
